verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I need more of You, Dear Jesus That's the way it's got to be I need more of You Till there's no room left in me All those wasted hours and minutes They're yours now From the start to the finish I need more of You in me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I need more of You Fill me with nothing less I need more of You Give me Your love And the world can have the rest

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can never get enough of Your grace Your peace, Your warmth and Your love I need more of You I need more of You I need more of You in me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I need more of You that's the way it's got to be I need more of You Fill me with Your love and the world can have the rest I could never get enough of Your grace, Your peace, Your warmth and Your love I need more of You in me

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There was a time in my life When I thought I had it all But all I really had Was an achin' empty soul
